title: Great 2-Territory Pink's Window Cleaning - Huntington & Long Beach
supportTraining: The franchisor provides full training at their site.
description:
--> Owner has priced this one to move! 2-Territory Pink's Window Cleaning franchise in the Long Beach and Huntington Beach areas. The business has been open for right at 1-year and they are close to break even, but life events have forced a quick sale. Pick up 2 prime territories (1 open, 1 expansion) with a 2025 leased van and employees for less than the cost to start-up a single location.

--> Pinks Window Services - A Wildly Popular Home Services Franchise Brand with 1 open territory in Long Beach and 1 unopened territory in Huntington Beach. Great Resale with High-Growth Franchise System with High Population Territories.

--> Great opportunity with one of the fastest-growing franchise concepts out there. Pink's Window Services is listed in the 2025 Entrepreneur magazine's Franchise 500! Great CEO or owner/operator concept!

--> Multiple revenue streams - ask about this when inquiring! The Pink's franchise system only requires one service (outside window cleaning) but offers the opportunity to easily add multiple revenue streams (inside window cleaning, screen cleaning, high area cleaning/dusting, solar panel cleaning, pressure washing, etc. So many opportunities to make money with this concept!

--> Pink's Franchise Disclosure Document (Item 19) for 2024 shows an affiliate-owned unit with over 67% gross margins and over 47% net margins, suggesting a very profitable business model! Strong existing franchisee validation with this concept - talk to other franchisees before you buy!

--> Pink's Window Services is home-based and works for residential, commercial, and industrial clients! The franchisor allows for owner/operator type system, executive model where you manage the business, or even semi-absentee!

--> Franchisor requirement for buyers includes a minimum of a $100k net worth. Since the business has been open for less than 3-years, an SBA loan on the primary business is doubtful; however, the unopened territory will likely be available for an SBA loan. The
